column1: # Tutorial Chapters 1 and 3: /File Save, /File Retrieve replacing
# in-memory changes with the saved workbook, /File Open adding another
# active file, and Ctrl-End Ctrl-PgDn file navigation.
# The tutorial uses WK3 sample files; L123's implemented persistence
# target is xlsx, so the acceptance test uses xlsx files.
# Create and save a second workbook.
# Retrieve the first file; the second workbook's in-memory value is
# replaced by the saved first workbook.
# Open the second file after the current active file. Focus remains on
# the first file until Ctrl-End Ctrl-PgDn rotates active files.
